phase_status.rule: Phase is set to idle when entered. Set to inprogress when the agent begins work. Set to completed once the phase's work is done and the gate to the next phase is satisfied. completed does NOT auto-advance — the workflow stays on the phase until the user (or orchestra at user direction) explicitly triggers transition to the next phase.

idle.name: Idle
idle.description: No active work. Ready to capture a new feature, bug, or improvement request.

brainstorming.name: Brainstorming
brainstorming.description: Agent loads the latest state of every relevant service, then interrogates the user with multi-choice questions to sharpen scope before a PRD is written. Each question must offer 2–4 distinct options with one option marked as the recommendation. Outcome (questions, answers, summary) is recorded on the feature's brainstorming object and feeds the next phase.

prd_creation.name: PRD Creation
prd_creation.description: Creating the main PRD from the brainstorming summary plus any user-supplied context (Lark notes, prior PRDs). The PRD pulls the brainstorming outcome into a dedicated section.

prd_splitting.name: PRD Splitting
prd_splitting.description: Single combined phase: agent (a) checks out the base branch, pulls latest, creates feature/<worker>/vc-<slug>, then (b) splits the main PRD into per-service PRDs on that branch.

implementation.name: Implementation
implementation.description: Implementing the feature across services. On entry, if any web-service work is in scope, the agent asks the user whether to wireframe-first (build web UI on the feature branch with mock/static data, then swap stubs for real API calls) or jump straight to implementation. Sequential strategy: frndos-implement handles all services. Agent Teams (Claude Code, experimental): per-service engineers run in parallel and each opens their own PR.

pr_submission.name: PR Submission
pr_submission.description: Agent runs full self code-review on its own diff (correctness, lint, tests, conventions), then runs the security-reviewer skill audit. Only after both pass does it open the PR. PR body includes the review notes and security audit summary.

pr_review.name: PR Review
pr_review.description: PR has reviewer / bot feedback. Agent classifies each thread (must-fix / nit / question), drafts a fix or reply, applies, pushes, and resolves the thread. Loops until zero open threads remain.

completion.name: Completed
completion.description: Feature merged. Cleaning up and marking complete.
